title: senecio cacaliaster
intro: Senecio cacaliaster, also known as Jacob's ladder or ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is known for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits. Senecio cacaliaster can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
